name: Covert Airfield
notes: Cloudreach only. The Air-domain counterpart to Supply Depot (data/buildings/supply_depot.json) — a support-troop specialist production building, distinct from Iron Aviary's pure-combat roster (Wingfighter, Thunder). Unlocks, in order: Cargocopter, Repair Drone, Kleptocopter (all non-combat Air troops, canTarget: []), then Shadowcopter — a stealthed, very-long-range harasser that never breaks cloak by firing (revealsOnAttack: false), the roster's one combat-capable unlock.
